payload.answer: The new memory appears to supersede the existing one: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession to treat the new memory as replacing the older current-employment fact, keep_both if both should be retained because they may refer to different Sams or need historical context, reject_new if the new statement is incorrect, or edit if either statement needs clarification before saving.
